overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character traverses a covered elevated pedestrian walkway, waits at a busy intersection with holographic billboards, and crosses a multi-lane street surrounded by towering skyscrapers and flying vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated pedestrian walkway with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian walkway beneath an illuminated metal framework, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in beige jacket walking in the opposite direction
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the pathway

entered.detail: futuristic metal framework with integrated lighting spanning the pedestrian path
floating digital advertisements displaying animated neon graphics
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows rising in the background
metal safety barrier separating the walkway from the street below
illuminated poles with yellow-orange lighting lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered elevated pedestrian walkway with orange textured flooring, surrounded by futuristic metal infrastructure and neon lighting. Holographic billboards float on the right side while skyscrapers loom in the distance, and other pedestrians pass by in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with traffic control and holographic signage

events.description: character stops at the traffic light pole to wait for vehicles to pass
futuristic sedans and flying vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the traffic control pole near the crosswalk, observing the flow of vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection
child in pink shirt walking past the waiting character

entered.detail: tall metal pole with traffic signals and a walk button
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
tall digital advertisement screen displaying product imagery

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open intersection, stopping at a traffic control pole to wait. The sky is fully visible with a dark blue twilight hue, while futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection and holographic advertisements glow in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: marked pedestrian crosswalk across multi-lane futuristic street

events.description: character begins running across the wide yellow-striped crosswalk
character reaches the opposite sidewalk and resumes walking

agents.ego_description: running across the wide intersection crosswalk with yellow stripes, then continuing along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: child in dark clothing running across the crosswalk alongside the character

entered.detail: continuation of the orange textured pedestrian walkway on the far side of the street
ground-level commercial buildings with illuminated entrances and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide multi-lane intersection via the yellow-striped crosswalk, running to avoid traffic. Upon reaching the opposite side, the character continues along the sidewalk as the urban landscape shifts to reveal different angles of the towering skyscrapers and street-level storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into the expansive, neon-lit openness of a futuristic city intersection. It begins with the character walking along a covered elevated walkway featuring orange textured flooring and floating holographic billboards, surrounded by dense metal infrastructure. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene opens up to a wide intersection under a dark blue twilight sky, where the camera lingers as they wait at a traffic control pole amidst passing futuristic vehicles. The movement then accelerates as the character runs across a yellow-striped crosswalk, weaving through the multi-lane street. Finally, the perspective shifts toward the opposite sidewalk, revealing new angles of towering skyscrapers and glowing street-level storefronts.
